full_text:
Chen Bao (Shengxian) 陳寶 (盛先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Bao (陳寶), styledShengxian (盛先), was born in Ba. Celebrated throughout the west, honest and maintained strict conduct. Chen Bao was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
